scores.rationale: It preserves the essential home, pricing, navigation, CTA, and mobile migration requirements.
Repeated navigation, hero hierarchy, CTA policy, and responsive tier ordering form a coherent two-screen surface.
The criteria are concise but actionable for layout, focus, mobile behavior, and source-content boundaries.
It clearly re-authors branding and rejects proprietary assets while retaining only generic information architecture.
Focus and overflow recovery are covered, but state and failure handling is thinner than the stronger packets.
Assumptions and an uninspected account-route limitation are explicit, with source decisions tied to stated evidence.
